leadText: If you were looking for the Key Item from The Teal Mask, see Teal Style Card. If you were looking for the Key Item from The Indigo Disk, see Indigo Style Card. The Style Card (Japanese: おしゃれカード Fashion Card) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Style Card unlocks additional clothing and hair styles for the player to purchase in boutiques and hair salons and across Galar .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA A card that increases the selection in boutiques and hair salons. S V Having one of these cards increases the selection available to you in boutiques and hair salons.

sections.title: In the core series games

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA A card that increases the selection in boutiques and hair salons. S V Having one of these cards increases the selection available to you in boutiques and hair salons. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh IA Fields of Honor (from Klara Sw / Avery Sh after defeating them for the first time)
